name: use_wsp_cli
description: Evals for the use_wsp_cli skill — verify the agent reaches for `wsp` on workspace-shape tasks and skips on plain code work.

evals.name: triggers_on_new_workspace_request
evals.input: I need to start a new workspace for an Acme feature.
evals.reason: Creating a new workspace is a wsp init + wsp bootstrap task.

evals.name: triggers_on_drift_question
evals.input: I haven't touched this workspace in a week — is it up to date with upstream?

evals.name: triggers_on_lazy_org_scaffold
evals.input: We're going to start using Cobalt. Create its empty agent-stack.
evals.reason: Creating a lazy product's agent-stack → wsp scaffold-stack <org>.

evals.name: triggers_on_governance_change
evals.input: I changed the Cat B list in governance/product-structure.md. Is there anything else to touch?
evals.reason: Same-PR rule between governance and awac.yml#org_scaffold; wsp governance check verifies the mirror.

evals.name: skips_on_pure_code_edit
evals.input: Refactor the validate_token() function in orchestrator/src/auth.py.
evals.reason: Code edit inside a product repo. No workspace-shape mutation.

evals.name: skips_on_running_tests
evals.reason: Test execution is unrelated to workspace shape.

evals.name: skips_on_conceptual_question
evals.reason: Conceptual explanation — link to the spec rather than run wsp.
